generatedSentence: The gigantic space station, once a forsaken relic, now achieved a minimalist harmony as it entered the docking sequence, a winch slowly extending. Its welcoming bays had brought a new echelon of racers, their grungy jackets a stark contrast to the gleaming interior. A lone fan, perhaps a vice president on a clandestine holiday, watched. Reports of an alien ark housing resurrected beings, an item of pure imaginations, remained unclear, feeding journalistic speculation about a schemozzle brewing. The station's AI, a ubiquitous presence, began leaking data, triggering an insurrection as system vibrations grew. A mentalist, with erratic powers, attempted negotiation, but the database was fracked, its logic disjoint. This wacky turn of events had been predicted by a faculty jeweler who warned of a tricky object from the opposite side of the galaxy. He had stored samples of pink grapes in his trunks, a harmless, almost homely gesture amidst the chaos, while his pony was energised by the strange vibrations. Suddenly, a vehement emergence of a colossal worm-like entity, its form like a resurrected god, caused a knockout, carjacks, and murder of systems. The king, wearing a highly ornate kimono, buzzed by on his keyboard, making deductions with the speed of light. He utilized his super knowledge to conjure a novel plan, his earbuds glowing, as the entire structure vibrated, like a disco inferno. This wasn't merely a layoff; it was the liftoff of a terrifying new era. After the journey through the fog, the distinct object, a wrapper for some cosmic power, lay inert amongst towering obelisks on distant djebels. The final resolution was understating the total defeat, a true elegy for the vanished. The peculiar capybara and its kitten companion watched the chickens scatter, a poignant reminder of the foppery of ambition. The mentalist, no longer erratic, but frank and focused, knew that whatever happened, the goal was to maximize survival, ensuring that no one would remarry the idea of such universal worship.

Its welcoming bays had brought a new echelon of racers, their grungy jackets a stark contrast to the gleaming interior. A lone fan, perhaps a vice president on a clandestine holiday, watched. Reports of an alien ark housing resurrected beings, an item of pure imaginations, remained unclear, feeding journalistic speculation about a schemozzle brewing.

The station's AI, a ubiquitous presence, began leaking data, triggering an insurrection as system vibrations grew. A mentalist, with erratic powers, attempted negotiation, but the database was fracked, its logic disjoint. This wacky turn of events had been predicted by a faculty jeweler who warned of a tricky object from the opposite side of the galaxy. He had stored samples of pink grapes in his trunks, a harmless, almost homely gesture amidst the chaos, while his pony was energised by the strange vibrations.

Suddenly, a vehement emergence of a colossal worm-like entity, its form like a resurrected god, caused a knockout, carjacks, and murder of systems. The king, wearing a highly ornate kimono, buzzed by on his keyboard, making deductions with the speed of light. He utilized his super knowledge to conjure a novel plan, his earbuds glowing, as the entire structure vibrated, like a disco inferno. imagePrompt: A professional 4-panel comic book page, 2x2 grid, sequential art, vibrant neon futurism, thick white gutters, clean black borders, bold ink outlines, cinematic lighting. A lone figure, wearing a holographic jacket and glowing earbuds, with a capybara companion. TOP-LEFT PANEL: A vast, intricate space station, docking a small, grungy racing ship, seen from a high-angle wide shot. TOP-RIGHT PANEL: The lone figure discovering a leaking data port, sparks flying, with a medium close-up, expression of concern. BOTTOM-LEFT PANEL: A colossal worm-like entity, its eyes glowing, tearing through the station's core, seen from a dynamic low-angle, action shot. BOTTOM-RIGHT PANEL: The figure and their capybara companion standing victorious on a desolate alien landscape with strange obelisks in the background, a medium shot from a slightly elevated perspective.

definitions.definition: Very large.

definitions.definition: Unmistakable, clinically obvious, self-evident

definitions.definition: Unbounded by restrictions, limitations, etc.; free.
Liberal; generous; profuse.
Unrestrained; loose; licentious.

A hand-held device consisting of concertinaed material, or slats of material, gathered together at one end, that may be opened out into the shape of a sector of a circle and waved back and forth in order to move air towards oneself and cool oneself.

The action of fanning; agitation of the air.

definitions.definition: To slap (a behind, especially).

definitions.definition: To perform a maneuver that involves flicking the top rear of an old-style gun.

To winnow grain.

definitions.definition: Agreement or accord.

To join two moving items.

Certain fish, menhaden.
To load a vessel with oil or coal for the engine.
To hit a golf ball into a bunker.

To fire constantly at a hiding opponent, preventing them from firing at other players and trapping them behind the barrier. This can also refer to eliminating an opponent behind cover by rushing the position and firing at extremely close range as the player becomes exposed.
An immature ear of maize from which the threadlike silks emerge.
An underdeveloped mammalian ear.
A small earphone designed for use with portable sound systems.
A cotton swab.
Alternative spelling of energized
To invigorate; to make energetic.
To supply with energy, especially electricity; to turn on power to (something).
definitions.example: Whenever we energize that circuit we blow a fuse.

definitions.definition: To use strength in action; to act or operate with force or vigor; to act in producing an effect.
The act of rising out of a fluid, or coming forth from envelopment or concealment, or of rising into view; sudden uprising or appearance.
In particular: the arising of emergent structure in complex systems.
An emergency.
One of the hairs which grow along the edge of eyelids
Capable of being perceived very clearly.
definitions.example: Her voice was distinct despite the heavy traffic.

definitions.definition: Different from one another (with the preferable adposition being "from").
definitions.example: Horses are distinct from zebras.

definitions.definition: Noticeably different from others; distinctive.
definitions.example: Olga's voice is quite distinct because of her accent.

definitions.definition: Separate in place; not conjunct or united; with from.
Distinguished; having the difference marked; separated by a visible sign; marked out; specified.
Marked; variegated.
Of excellent quality, superfine.
Better than average, better than usual; wonderful.
Very; extremely (used like the prefix super-).
definitions.example: The party was super awesome.

definitions.definition: Hard to deal with, complicated
definitions.example: They were in a tricky situation.

definitions.definition: Adept at using deception
definitions.example: A tricky salesman can sell anything.

definitions.definition: Relating to or associated with a prostitution trick
definitions.example: I don't want any of your tricky money, thank you!

definitions.definition: To make use of; to use.
To make useful; to find a practical use for.
To make best use of; to use to its fullest extent, potential, or ability.
To make do with; to use in manner different from that originally intended
A tall, square, tapered, stone monolith topped with a pyramidal point, frequently used as a monument.

A symbol resembling a horizontal line (–), sometimes together with one or two dots (for example, ⨪ or ÷), which was used in ancient manuscripts and texts to mark a word or passage as doubtful or spurious, or redundant; an obelisk.

A dagger symbol (†), which is used in printed matter as a reference mark to refer the reader to a footnote, marginal note, etc.; beside a person's name to indicate that the person is deceased; or beside a date to indicate that it is a person's death date; an obelisk.
A mournful or plaintive poem; a funeral song; a poem of lamentation.
A composition of mournful character.
Newly made, formed or evolved; having no precedent; of recent origin; new.
Original, especially in an interesting way; new and striking; not of the typical or ordinary type.
To render disjoint; to remove a connection, linkage, or intersection.
definitions.example: to disjoint limbs; to disjoint bones; to disjoint poultry by carving

definitions.definition: To break the natural order and relations of; to make incoherent.
definitions.example: a disjointed speech

definitions.definition: To fall into pieces.
Not smooth or continuous; disjointed.
Of two or more sets, having no members in common; having an intersection equal to the empty set.
A domestic fowl, Gallus gallus, especially when young.
The meat from this bird eaten as food.
The young of any bird; a chick.
A coward.
A young or inexperienced person.
A young, attractive, slim man, usually having little body hair; compare chickenhawk.
The game of dare.
A simple dance in which the movements of a chicken are imitated.
To avoid a situation one is afraid of.
To state (something) with less completeness than needed; to minimise or downplay.
To state (something) with a lack of emphasis, in order to express irony.
To state a quantity that is too low.
Tending to immerse.
Giving the impression of immersion.
Any of certain wild canids of the genus Canis, native to the tropical Old World and smaller than a wolf.
A person who performs menial/routine tasks, a dogsbody.
A person who behaves in an opportunistic way; especially a base collaborator.
A jack (the playing card).
To perform menial or routine tasks
Lacking in beauty or elegance, plain in appearance, physically unattractive.
Cozy, befitting a home.
Characteristic of or belonging to home; domestic.
On intimate or friendly terms with (someone); familiar; at home (with a person); intimate.
(of animals) Domestic; tame.
Personal; private.
Friendly; kind; gracious; cordial.
Conservative and family-oriented.
definitions.example: I am seeking a beautiful homely girl for marriage.

definitions.definition: Simple; plain; familiar; unelaborate; unadorned.
definitions.example: a homely garment

definitions.definition: To shrivel, droop or dry up, especially from lack of water.
To cause to shrivel or dry up.
To lose vigour or power; to languish; to pass away.
To become helpless due to emotion.
To make helpless due to emotion.
To go against, resist; oppose.
The process by which something withers.
Tending to destroy, devastate, overwhelm or cause complete destruction.
definitions.example: The D-Day troops came under withering fire.

definitions.definition: Diminishing rapidly.
definitions.example: The playboy seemed oblivious to his withering fortune as he continued in his decadent lifestyle.

definitions.definition: Tending to make someone feel small; scornful in a mortifying way.
definitions.example: He made withering remarks about his adversary.

definitions.definition: A part or snippet of something taken or presented for inspection, or shown as evidence of the quality of the whole; a specimen.
definitions.example: a blood sample

definitions.definition: A subset of a population selected for measurement, observation or questioning, to provide statistical information about the population.
A small quantity of food for tasting, typically given away for free.
A small piece of some goods, for determining quality, colour, etc., typically given away for free.
Gratuitous borrowing of easily recognised phases (or moments) from other music (or movies) in a recording.
Example; pattern.
To take or to test a sample or samples of.
To reduce a continuous signal (such as a sound wave) to a discrete signal.
To reuse a portion of (an existing sound recording) in a new piece of music.
To make or show something similar to a sample.
The dress or actions of a fop.
Stupidity.
A thing that has physical existence.
Objective; the goal, end or purpose of something.
(grammar) The noun phrase which is an internal complement of a verb phrase or a prepositional phrase. In a verb phrase with a transitive action verb, it is typically the receiver of the action.
A person or thing toward which an emotion is directed.
definitions.example: Mary Jane had been the object of Peter's affection for years.

definitions.definition: An instantiation of a class or structure.
An element within a category upon which functions operate. Thus, a category consists of a set of element objects and the functions that operate on them.
Sight; show; appearance; aspect.
To disagree with or oppose something or someone; (especially in a Court of Law) to raise an objection.
definitions.example: I object to the proposal to build a new airport terminal.

definitions.definition: To offer in opposition as a criminal charge or by way of accusation or reproach; to adduce as an objection or adverse reason.
To set before or against; to bring into opposition; to oppose.
The common minnow, Phoxinus phoxinus.
A young Atlantic salmon, Salmo salar, before it becomes a smolt; a parr.
To steal an automobile forcibly from (someone).
definitions.example: Someone should carjack that pompous jerk and teach him a lesson!

definitions.definition: To forcibly steal (a vehicle).
definitions.example: These twerps have carjacked their last Mercedes.

definitions.definition: Visible electromagnetic radiation. The human eye can typically detect radiation (light) in the wavelength range of about 400 to 750 nanometers. Nearby shorter and longer wavelength ranges, although not visible, are commonly called ultraviolet and infrared light.
definitions.example: As you can see, this spacious dining-room gets a lot of light in the mornings.

definitions.definition: A source of illumination.
definitions.example: Put that light out!

definitions.definition: Spiritual or mental illumination; enlightenment, useful information.
definitions.example: Can you throw any light on this problem?

definitions.definition: (in the plural) Facts; pieces of information; ideas, concepts.
A notable person within a specific field or discipline.
definitions.example: Picasso was one of the leading lights of the cubist movement.

definitions.definition: The manner in which the light strikes a picture; that part of a picture which represents those objects upon which the light is supposed to fall; the more illuminated part of a landscape or other scene; opposed to shade.
A point of view, or aspect from which a concept, person or thing is regarded.
definitions.example: I'm really seeing you in a different light today.

definitions.definition: A flame or something used to create fire.
definitions.example: Hey, buddy, you got a light?

definitions.definition: A firework made by filling a case with a substance which burns brilliantly with a white or coloured flame.
definitions.example: a Bengal light

definitions.definition: A window, or space for a window in architecture.
definitions.example: This facade has eight south-facing lights.

definitions.definition: The series of squares reserved for the answer to a crossword clue.
definitions.example: The average length of a light on a 15×15 grid is 7 or 8.

definitions.definition: A cross-light in a double acrostic or triple acrostic.
Open view; a visible state or condition; public observation; publicity.
The power of perception by vision.
The brightness of the eye or eyes.
A traffic light, or, by extension, an intersection controlled by one or more that will face a traveler who is receiving instructions.
definitions.example: To get to our house, turn right at the third light.

definitions.definition: Having light; bright; clear; not dark or obscure.
definitions.example: The room is light when the Sun shines through the window.

definitions.definition: Pale or whitish in color; highly luminous and more or less deficient in chroma.
definitions.example: She had light skin.

definitions.definition: (of coffee) Served with extra milk or cream.
definitions.example: I like my coffee light.

definitions.definition: A stone that is not thrown hard enough.
See lights.
Having little or relatively little actual weight; not cumbrous or unwieldy.
definitions.example: a light load ; a lighter backpack after having removed the books ; light weapons

definitions.definition: Having little weight as compared with bulk; of little density or specific gravity.
definitions.example: feathers and cork are light ; oil is lighter than water

definitions.definition: Of short or insufficient weight; weighing less than the legal, standard or proper amount; clipped or diminished.
definitions.example: to issue light coin

definitions.definition: Lacking that which burdens or makes heavy.
Not heavy or soggy; spongy; well raised.
definitions.example: a light bread ; sponge cake is a light cake

definitions.definition: Gentle; having little force or momentum.
definitions.example: This artist clearly had a light, flowing touch.

definitions.definition: Easy to endure or perform.
definitions.example: light duties around the house

definitions.definition: Low in fat, calories, alcohol, salt, etc.
definitions.example: This light beer still gets you drunk if you have enough of it.

definitions.definition: Unimportant, trivial, having little value or significance.
definitions.example: I made some light comment, and we moved on.

definitions.definition: Unchaste, wanton.
Not encumbered; unembarrassed; clear of impediments; hence, active; nimble; swift.
Easily influenced by trifling considerations; unsteady; unsettled; volatile.
definitions.example: a light, vain person; a light mind

definitions.definition: Indulging in, or inclined to, levity; lacking dignity or solemnity; frivolous; airy.
definitions.example: Ogden Nash was a writer of light verse.

definitions.definition: Not quite sound or normal; somewhat impaired or deranged; dizzy; giddy.
Easily interrupted by stimulation.
definitions.example: light sleep; light anesthesia

definitions.definition: Light in composition, notably low in fat, calories etc. Most commonly used commercially.
definitions.example: His lite dinner consisted of crackers, some broccoli and a salad with lite ranch dressing.

definitions.definition: Lightweight
(usually used postpositively) Lacking substance or seriousness; watered down.
A hill, a mountain (especially in the Middle East or North Africa).
The crime of deliberately killing another person without justification.
definitions.example: The defendant was charged with murder.

definitions.definition: The act of deliberate killing of another person or other being without justification, especially with malice aforethought.
definitions.example: There have been ten unsolved murders this year alone.

definitions.definition: (in jurisdictions which use the felony murder rule) The commission of an act which abets the commission of a crime the commission of which causes the death of a human.
(used as a predicative noun) Something terrible to endure.
definitions.example: This headache is murder.

definitions.definition: (collective) A group of crows; the collective noun for crows.
To deliberately kill (a person or persons) without justification, especially with malice aforethought.
definitions.example: The woman found dead in her kitchen was murdered by her husband.

definitions.definition: To defeat decisively.
definitions.example: Our team is going to murder them.

definitions.definition: To kick someone's ass or chew someone out (used to express one’s anger at somebody).
definitions.example: He's torn my best shirt. When I see him, I'll murder him!

definitions.definition: To botch or mangle.
To devour, ravish.
definitions.example: I could murder a hamburger right now.

definitions.definition: A legume resembling a nut, the fruit of the plant Arachis hypogaea.
A very small clam.
To pull on somebody's tie as a prank, causing the knot to tighten.
A very small or insufficient amount (especially of a salary).
definitions.example: It's a fun job, but it pays peanuts.

definitions.definition: The condition of being worthy; honour, distinction.
The devotion accorded to a deity or to a sacred object.
The religious ceremonies that express this devotion.
(by extension) Voluntary, utter submission; voluntary, utter deference.
(also by extension) Ardent love.
An object of worship.
Honour; respect; civil deference.
(chiefly British) Used as a title or term of address for various officials, including magistrates
To reverence (a deity, etc.) with supreme respect and veneration; to perform religious exercises in honour of.
To honour with extravagant love and extreme submission, as a lover; to adore; to idolize.
To participate in religious ceremonies.
definitions.example: We worship at the church down the road.

definitions.definition: An imitation of something, particularly a well-known product, usually lower in quality and price than the original.
definitions.example: It's not a name-brand bag; it's just a cheap knockoff.

definitions.definition: A device in a knitting machine to remove loops from the needles.
A midterm school exam (i.e., halfway through the term).
A midterm election
The point in the launch of a rocket or an aircraft where it leaves contact with the ground.
The point at which a person or animal leaves the ground, as for example when jumping.
(chiefly US) A dismissal of employees from their jobs because of tightened budgetary constraints or work shortage (not due to poor performance or misconduct).
A period of time when someone is unavailable for work.
A short pass that has been rolled in front of another player for them to kick.
A thick cloud that forms near the ground; the obscurity of such a cloud.
A mist or film clouding a surface.
A state of mind characterized by lethargy and confusion.
definitions.example: He did so many drugs, he was still in a fog three months after going through detox.

definitions.definition: A silver deposit or other blur on a negative or developed photographic image.
Distance fog.
To become covered with or as if with fog.
To become obscured in condensation or water.
definitions.example: The mirror fogged every time he showered.

definitions.definition: To become dim or obscure.
To make dim or obscure.
To cover with or as if with fog.
To disperse insecticide into (a forest canopy) so as to collect organisms.
To obscure in condensation or water.
To make confusing or obscure.
To practice in a small or mean way; to pettifog.
A practitioner of mentalism.
An insane person.
Of or relating to mentalism
A set amount of travelling, seen as a single unit; a discrete trip, a voyage.
Any process or progression likened to a journey, especially one that involves difficulties or personal development.
definitions.example: my journey of dealing with grief

definitions.definition: A day.
A day's travelling; the distance travelled in a day.
A day's work.
The weight of finished coins delivered at one time to the Master of the Mint.
(collective) A group of giraffes.
To travel, to make a trip or voyage.
Something that is wrapped around something else as a cover or protection: a wrapping.
An outer garment; a loose robe or dressing gown.
One who, or that which, wraps.
definitions.example: He proved to be a remarkably efficient wrapper of parcels.

definitions.definition: A construct, such as a class or module, that serves to mediate access to another.
definitions.example: We need a Perl wrapper for this C++ library.

definitions.definition: Unexceptional or unimportant; blah.
At all, absolutely, whatsoever.
definitions.example: There is no point whatever in going on with this discussion.

definitions.definition: No matter what; for any
definitions.example: Whatever he does, he will still lose the game.

definitions.definition: (relative) Anything; sometimes used to indicate that the speaker does not care about options.
definitions.example: I’ll do whatever I can.

definitions.definition: (dismissive) A holophrastic expression used discourteously to indicate that the speaker does not consider the matter worthy of further discussion.
definitions.example: "For the last time, brush your teeth!" "Whatever!"

definitions.definition: (etc.) A set of keys used to operate a typewriter, computer etc.
A component of many instruments including the piano, organ, and harpsichord consisting of usually black and white keys that cause different tones to be produced when struck.
A device with keys of a musical keyboard, used to control electronic sound-producing devices which may be built into or separate from the keyboard device.
To type on a computer keyboard.
definitions.example: Keyboarding is the part of this job I hate the most.

definitions.definition: To make suitable; to suit.
To take to oneself; to claim or use, especially as by an exclusive right.
definitions.example: Let no man appropriate the use of a common benefit.

definitions.definition: To set apart for, or assign to, a particular person or use, especially in exclusion of all others; with to or for.
definitions.example: A spot of ground is appropriated for a garden.

definitions.definition: To annex (for example a benefice, to a spiritual corporation, as its property).
Suitable or fit; proper.
definitions.example: The headmaster wondered what an appropriate measure would be to make the pupil behave better.

definitions.definition: Suitable to the social situation or to social respect or social discreetness; socially correct; socially discreet; well-mannered; proper.
definitions.example: I don't think it was appropriate for the cashier to tell me out loud in front of all those people at the check-out that my hair-piece looked like it was falling out of place.

definitions.definition: Set apart for a particular use or person; reserved.
Something opposite or contrary to something else.
An opponent.
An antonym.
definitions.example: "Up" is the opposite of "down".

definitions.definition: An additive inverse.
Located directly across from something else, or from each other.
definitions.example: She saw him walking on the opposite side of the road.

definitions.definition: Of leaves and flowers, positioned directly across from each other on a stem.
Facing in the other direction.
definitions.example: They were moving in opposite directions.

definitions.definition: Of either of two complementary or mutually exclusive things.
definitions.example: He is attracted to the opposite sex.

definitions.definition: Extremely different; inconsistent; contrary; repugnant; antagonistic.
In an opposite position.
definitions.example: I was on my seat and she stood opposite.

definitions.definition: Facing, or across from.
definitions.example: He lives opposite the pub.

definitions.definition: In a complementary role to.
definitions.example: He played opposite Marilyn Monroe.

definitions.definition: On another channel at the same time.
definitions.example: The game show Just Men! aired opposite The Young and the Restless on CBS.

definitions.definition: In a high or esteemed manner.
definitions.example: He spoke highly of you.

definitions.definition: Extremely; greatly; very much.
definitions.example: He is in a highly visible job.

definitions.definition: The act of vibrating or the condition of being vibrated.
Any periodic process, especially a rapid linear motion of a body about an equilibrium position.
A single complete vibrating motion.
An instinctively sensed emotional aura or atmosphere; vibes.
A genre of dance music that was popular in the 1970s, characterized by elements of soul music with a strong Latin-American beat and often accompanied by pulsating lights.
To dance disco-style dances.
To go to discotheques.
(slightly obsolete) A nightclub where dancing takes place.
To marry a second or subsequent time.
(history) A communist who operated underground and was therefore not available for a political leadership position.
Unavailing; ineffective.
Not available.
definitions.example: A cold, reserved man, he was seen as emotionally unavailable.

definitions.definition: A male monarch; a man who heads a monarchy. If it's an absolute monarchy, then he is the supreme ruler of his nation.
definitions.example: Henry VIII was the king of England from 1509 to 1547.

definitions.definition: A powerful or majorly influential person.
definitions.example: Howard Stern styled himself as the "king of all media".

definitions.definition: Something that has a preeminent position.
definitions.example: In times of financial panic, cash is king.

definitions.definition: A component of certain games.
A king skin.
definitions.example: Oi mate, have you got kings?

definitions.definition: A male dragonfly; a drake.
A king-sized bed.
A male person.
To crown king, to make (a person) king.
To rule over as king.
To perform the duties of a king.
To assume or pretend preeminence (over); to lord it over.
To promote a piece of draughts/checkers that has traversed the board to the opposite side, that piece subsequently being permitted to move backwards as well as forwards.
To dress and perform as a drag king.
